jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Cyber Risk Manager (Second-line Controls)

titleByLocale.it: Cyber Risk Manager (controlli di seconda linea)

jobs.description:
• Mission 
 Operating in a highly regulated banking environment (FINMA, EBA, DORA, etc.) and amid accelerating digital transformation – including the expansion of e-banking and mobile banking services, the Group Risk Department is seeking a senior cybersecurity specialist to carry out second-line control activities.
Independent of first-line operational teams, the role holder contributes to ensuring the effectiveness, consistency, and regulatory compliance of the Bank’s cybersecurity framework.
 
 
• Main responsibilities 
• Execute the second-line control plan across the full cybersecurity perimeter: IAM, PAM, endpoints, cloud, networks, e-banking and mobile banking.

• Conduct periodic and thematic controls on security processes and measures implemented by first-line operational teams, to ensure that information security risks are identified, assessed, treated, and reported to relevant stakeholders.

• Verify compliance with banking regulatory requirements (e.g., FINMA, EBA, DORA, etc.).

• Produce well-documented control reports, issue actionable recommendations, and monitor the progress of remediation plans.

• Contribute to maintaining cyber risk indicators (KRI/KPI), and feed reporting to the Head of Cyber Risk Control.

• Maintain a regulatory watch specific to the banking sector, and flag impacts on the control framework.

• Work collaboratively with Internal audit and Group Security, within a three lines of defense model.

• Support first-line teams in understanding control requirements and fostering a cyber risk culture tailored to the banking sector.
 
 
 
• Your Profile 
• Master’s degree (or equivalent) in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, Information Systems Engineering, or a business school with a specialization in security

• Minimum 7 to 12 years of experience in cybersecurity, ideally in a banking institution

• Good command of frameworks and working knowledge of FINMA circular on operational resilience, DORA, EBA Guidelines on ICT and Security Risk.

• Good understanding of technical architecture (network, cloud, IAM, AD, fraud prevention).

• Ability to document findings clearly and communicate them to both technical and non-technical stakeholders

• Analytical rigor, autonomy, and a collaborative working style.

• Proficiency in French and English, both written and spoken.
 
 

• Core Competencies 
• Critical thinking and objectivity in assessing control frameworks.

• Ability to work cross-functionally with diverse stakeholders.

• Proactiv, solution-orient mindset when facing identified risks.

• Professional integrity and respect for confidentiality.

• Appetite for regulatory watch, continuous improvement, and knowledge sharing.
 
 
 
• Others 
• Swiss Residence 
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: System Engineer - Messaging Specialist
jobs.description:
• Mission : 
 
 As a Senior Systems Engineer, you will play a crucial role in managing and improving our Microsoft/Citrix based systems and infrastructure. Your expertise will be essential in ensuring high availability, performance, and security of our IT services. 
 
 
 Challenges: 

• Evolve in a challenging, regulated environment for a fast and growing Private Bank. 

 
 
• Main responsibilities: 

• Design, implementation, and management of Microsoft-related technologies, including but not limited to Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, Microsoft PKI, DFS, MS Teams.

• Design, implementation, and management of the Exchange infrastructure

• Monitor and optimize email server performance, storage, and capacity planning

• Manage the Archiving solution, based on Enterprise Vault, ensure retention and compliance rules are applied

• Prepare and operate the transition to the Cloud Solution

• Design, implementation, and management of Citrix-related technologies,

• Provide production support for our Microsoft environments, ensuring optimal performance and reliability.

• Manage and resolve complex incidents and problems, minimizing downtime and mitigating impacts on business operations.

• Implement and maintain system monitoring solutions to pre-emptively identify potential issues (SCOM / NIMSOFT).

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams for system enhancements and integration of new technologies.

• Ensure compliance with security policies and procedures, including regular system audits and updates.

• Conduct root cause analysis for major incidents and lead problem management processes.

• Develop and maintain comprehensive documentation for system configurations, procedures, and service records.

• Be part of an on-call service rotation one week per month (24/24-7j/7)
 
 

• Must have with strong expertise in : 

• Microsoft Infra (AD, DHCP, SCOM)

• Exchange 2019 and email security solutions

• SCCM

• Powershell scripting

• MS Team

• Ansible
 
 
 

• Nice to have : 

• M365

• Intune

• Citrix

• AirWatch MDM Mobility plateform
 
 
• Others 
 
• Swiss Residence 
 

• Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

• Design, implementation, and management of Microsoft-related technologies, including but not limited to Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, Microsoft PKI, DFS, MS Teams.
• Design, implementation, and management of the Exchange infrastructure
• Monitor and optimize email server performance, storage, and capacity planning
• Manage the Archiving solution, based on Enterprise Vault, ensure retention and compliance rules are applied
• Prepare and operate the transition to the Cloud Solution
• Design, implementation, and management of Citrix-related technologies,
• Provide production support for our Microsoft environments, ensuring optimal performance and reliability.
• Manage and resolve complex incidents and problems, minimizing downtime and mitigating impacts on business operations.
• Implement and maintain system monitoring solutions to pre-emptively identify potential issues (SCOM / NIMSOFT).
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams for system enhancements and integration of new technologies.
• Ensure compliance with security policies and procedures, including regular system audits and updates.
• Conduct root cause analysis for major incidents and lead problem management processes.
• Develop and maintain comprehensive documentation for system configurations, procedures, and service records.
• Be part of an on-call service rotation one week per month (24/24-7j/7)
• Must have with strong expertise in :
• Microsoft Infra (AD, DHCP, SCOM)
• Exchange 2019 and email security solutions
• SCCM
• Powershell scripting
• MS Team
• Ansible
• Nice to have :
• M365
• Intune
• Citrix
• AirWatch MDM Mobility plateform
• Others
• Swiss Residence
• Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.title: Assistant Relationship Manager LATAM
jobs.description:
Mission 
 Assist the relationship manager(s) in opening new relationships and serving clients, in compliance with 
 the Bank’s internal regulations and guidelines within the Hispanic Markets. 
 Main responsibilities 
 
• Prepare the necessary documentation for client meetings and business trips for relationship managers 

• Handle and monitor stock exchange orders, forex transactions, fiduciary relationships, loans, payment orders and credit card applications 

• Provide administrative support to the Team Head 

• Cash Management 

• Assist in AML clarifications and prepare clients KYC and related updates 

• Direct interaction with clients by phone, e-mail and, occasionally in meetings 

• Prepare and monitor account openings, closings and mutations 

• Maintain records in compliance with internal and external regulation (for example: portfolio reviews, AML, KYC, etc.) 

• Perform other administrative tasks as needed (for example: preparing presentations, travel arrangements, helping clients with any requests, banking and non-banking, etc.) 

• Deputy of other assistants if needed 
 
 Your Profile 
 
• Degree in a related field (banking apprenticeship, CYP, banking internship or similar) 

• Private Banking certificate, SAQ or other equivalent certification a plus 

• Minimum 5 years of experience in a similar role or within private banking 

• Strong banking, Compliance and KYC knowledge 

• Team spirit, inter-personal skills, highly service and client oriented as well as communication skills 

• Fluent in French, Spanish and English. Any additional language is an added value 
 
 Others 
 
• Swiss Residence is mandatory 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.title: WM Business Monitoring Officer (EAM controls)
jobs.description:
Mission 
 As Business Monitoring Officer you will manage EAM's onboarding at group level and ensure the completion of the yearly EAM control plan and keep it up to date. You will also deliver commercial, administrative and operational support to the Market Heads and the respective teams.
 Main responsibilities 
 
• Performing first line of controls as per the EAM Control Plan and Management & Functional Controls framework

• Designing, implementing, and monitoring specific action plans and projects. Identifying areas for improvement in existing procedures and processes

• Ensuring relevant documentation is requested, obtained, and registered as part of the EAM on boarding

• Supporting the EAM teams on commercial, administrative, and operational day to day or exceptional requests

• Continuously improving and automating activity

• Delivering any other task required by Management relating to the Mission of the employee
 
 Your profile 
 
• Degree in a related field (banking apprenticeship, CYP, banking internship or similar) 

• Minimum 3 year in control tasks in a Swiss Banking environment

• Proficiency in Compliance and Regulatory matters surrounding External Asset Management

• Fluent in French and English. Any additional language is a plus

• High proficiency in MS Excel, MS PowerPoint, MS Power BI, SQL language, MS Power Query, SAP Business

• Ability to embrace a strategic vision and translate it in simple, pragmatic, and feasible solutions

• Strong analytical, naturally well-organized, and curious mindset with excellent research skills 

• Assertive, open, and constructive communication, both written and verbal

• An open, flexible, and confident team-player who can quickly adapt to new challenges

• Self-disciplined, goal-oriented, having a "Problem-Action-Results" approach

• Openness to new ideas and be force of proposition
 
 Others 
 
• Swiss Residence 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.title: Quality control specialist - Temporary 6 months
jobs.description:
Mission 
 
As part of a team of eight, the Compliance Control specialist will help to implement the control plan, which covers all compliance-related activities.
 
 Challenges 
To contribute to the achievement of the Bank’s objective of maintaining a risk control framework of the highest standard.
 Role Description 
• Review the design and effectiveness of controls in place for various compliance-related activities (financial crime, anti-money laundering, know-your-customer, sanctions, investor protection, cross-border operations, etc.)
• Lead or participate in control reviews by conducting diagnostics and carrying out detailed testing.
• Identify areas for improvement and recommend corrective actions.
• Monitor the timely implementation of recommendations and action plans.
• Work closely with Compliance, Business Risk & Controls Departments to ensure execution of controls and resolution of issues.
• Produce high quality working papers and control reports in accordance with the CCRM methodology.
 
 Your Profile 
 Education: University Degree (Business / Law) 
 Year of Experience: 3-7 years 
 Skills & Requirements: Compliance, Audit, Internal control
 Languages: 
 French: Fluent
 English: Fluent 
 Swiss residence: Mandatory 
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.title: Investment Content Designer (Temporary 12 months)
jobs.description:
Mission 
 A creative role at the heart of investment.
Within Investment Marketing, we are looking for a talented designer. You will be a full member of the Investment Management team, helping define how our investment thinking is structured, articulated, and presented to Wealth Management, to clients, to investors.
At the intersection of portfolio management, strategy and other business lines, you transform complex financial expertise into clear, structured and visually compelling materials.
You ensure that investment communication is rigorous, compliant with regulatory requirements, and fully aligned with the identity and standards of an international investment group.
 
• You design the materials that shape how investment specialists communicate their conviction.

• Your output has immediate visibility with investment digital platforms.

• You have real influence over the visual and editorial standards of the Investment Management team
 
 
 Key Responsibilities 
 
• Investment Content 
Structure and formalise investment views
Translate complex financial analysis into clear, pedagogical narratives
Ensure consistency between investment philosophy and client communication
Contribute to multi-asset strategy articulation and portfolio frameworks

• Editorial & Visual Design 
Lead the design of strategic presentations, outlook publications and investment solutions documentation
Maintain high visual standards aligned with private banking expectations
Build clear message hierarchies and rigorous visual architecture
Ensure coherence across asset classes and publication formats

• Digital Integration 
Oversee content production in Adobe InDesign, related design tools and adapt for digital platforms
Contribute to the investment content distribution strategy
Enhance client experience across digital investment platform

• Governance & Standards 
Coordinate cross-functional initiatives within Investment Management
Ensure regulatory soundness of all materials in close collaboration with Compliance
Drive continuous improvement of production, validation and deployment processes
Define and harmonise editorial and visual standards at group level
 
 
 Profile 
 
• Experience 
Background in private banking, asset management or investment banking
Demonstrated ability to structure complex investment content
Experience in a regulated financial communication environment
Strong interest in the digital evolution of investment content

• Education 
Higher education in finance, economics or a related discipline.
A background in graphic communication or design is considered a strong advantage.

• Languages 
French - fluent or native
English - fluent, written and spoken
Additional languages are an advantage

• Technical skills 
Advanced proficiency in Adobe InDesign — essential
Illustrator and Photoshop — an advantage
Familiarity with regulated financial communication requirements
Experience adapting investment materials for digital platforms
Understanding of multi-asset reporting frameworks

 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

• Languages French - fluent or native English - fluent, written and spoken Additional languages are an advantage
• Technical skills Advanced proficiency in Adobe InDesign — essential Illustrator and Photoshop — an advantage Familiarity with regulated financial communication requirements Experience adapting investment materials for digital platforms Understanding of multi-asset reporting frameworks Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives
descriptionByLocale.en:
Mission A creative role at the heart of investment. Within Investment Marketing, we are looking for a talented designer. You will be a full member of the Investment Management team, helping define how our investment thinking is structured, articulated, and presented to Wealth Management, to clients, to investors. At the intersection of portfolio management, strategy and other business lines, you transform complex financial expertise into clear, structured and visually compelling materials. You ensure that investment communication is rigorous, compliant with regulatory requirements, and fully aligned with the identity and standards of an international investment group.
• You design the materials that shape how investment specialists communicate their conviction.
• Your output has immediate visibility with investment digital platforms.
• You have real influence over the visual and editorial standards of the Investment Management team Key Responsibilities
• Investment Content Structure and formalise investment views Translate complex financial analysis into clear, pedagogical narratives Ensure consistency between investment philosophy and client communication Contribute to multi-asset strategy articulation and portfolio frameworks
• Editorial & Visual Design Lead the design of strategic presentations, outlook publications and investment solutions documentation Maintain high visual standards aligned with private banking expectations Build clear message hierarchies and rigorous visual architecture Ensure coherence across asset classes and publication formats
• Digital Integration Oversee content production in Adobe InDesign, related design tools and adapt for digital platforms Contribute to the investment content distribution strategy Enhance client experience across digital investment platform

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Corporate Action Specialist
jobs.description:
• Daily business responsibilities 

• Handle activities of one of the following pools: 

• Receipt of information: 

• Cross analyze information received: custodians swifts, agent/Funds prospectus and financial providers (such as Bloomberg, Telekurs) 

• Create adequate corporate event in the corporate action database 

• Answer to questions from Relationship Managers, other internal departments, external parties including clients. 

• Notification of information: 

• Write announcement to Relationship Managers and Clients 

• Instruction processing: 

• Reconcile holdings, determine entitlements, manage pending positions. 

• Collect and follow up on instructions 

• Transmit instructions to our correspondents, Funds manager and/or other external parties, control of their safe delivery and acceptance 

• Allocation to clients: 

• Book corporate actions events in clients’ accounts (cash and/or securities) 

• Review the overnight bookings 

• 

• Overall responsibilities 

• Follow-up on various topics and issues over the lifecycle of a Corporate Action 

• Interchange from one pool to the other, depending on needs 

• Collaborate with others team members outside the assigned pool 

• Core competencies 

• Think in "Problem-Action-Results" terms 

• Be proactive and driven 

• Show strong client service ethic 

• Maintain quality standards despite schedule pressures 

• Highly organized, manage tight deadlines within a high-risk environment, ability to work under pressure 

• Strong analytical skills with an ability to identify problems and propose solutions. 

• Express opinions and criticism in a constructive way 

• Be a continuous learner 

• Adaptability, self-motivation and teamwork 
 

• Good understanding of the risks inherent to the corporate actions environment and demonstrate good discipline around control and escalation. 

• Build lasting client relationships 

• Consistently comply with internal & external regulations 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.title: WM Data Scientist (Zurich, 100%)
jobs.description:
Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) is a leading Private Bank specializing in Wealth Management (WM), offering tailored financial solutions to a diverse international clientele. Data analytics plays a key role in strengthening operational oversight, improving client understanding, and enhancing compliance and risk management processes.
 As a WM Data Scientist within the COO Wealth Management office, you will work at the intersection of data science, WM operational processes, and compliance analytics. The role focuses on analyzing internal data to identify patterns in client activity, operational workflows, and risk indicators, helping the organization better detect anomalies, improve client monitoring frameworks, and strengthen decision-making.
 This position goes beyond traditional reporting. You will apply statistical methods, behavioral analytics, and quantitative modelling to improve rule-based monitoring frameworks, support client lifecycle analytics, and optimize operational risk controls.
 The role also includes contributing to the definition of analytical frameworks and data specifications that will support future AI initiatives within the Wealth Management COO organization.
 
 Mission 
 Development of intelligent analytical solutions to complex operational and risk-related problems by extracting, transforming, modelling, and analysing data across multiple banking systems.
 The role focuses particularly on analytical challenges at the intersection of WM operations, compliance monitoring, and business risk controls, including the optimisation of monitoring alerts and detection frameworks.
 You will be mentored by the Head of WM Reporting & Dashboards located in our Zurich office, with occasional travel to Geneva.
 
 Main responsibilities 
 
• Extract, transform, and structure data from multiple internal banking systems and operational processes

• Perform advanced statistical analysis and data exploration to identify behavioural patterns in client activity and operational processes

• Analyse and refine rule-based monitoring scenarios and threshold parameters used in transaction monitoring frameworks

• Develop quantitative models and analytical approaches to improve client segmentation, lifecycle analysis, and risk indicators

• Contribute to the optimisation of monitoring alerts and detection frameworks related to client activity and transaction behaviour

• Translate analytical findings into clear insights and recommendations for operational, compliance, and management stakeholders

• Contribute to defining analytical specifications and data frameworks supporting future advanced analytics and AI initiatives

 
 
 
 
 Qualifications 
 
• Academic degree (BA/MA) in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Data Science, or a related field 

• At least 5 years of experience in a similar role 

• Banking experience strongly preferred, or experience in a similar data science environment

• International work experience desired for this role

• Fluent in English; additional languages are an advantage

• Experience working with large datasets and applying statistical or quantitative methods to operational, compliance, or risk-related problems

• Experience analysing rule-based monitoring frameworks, risk indicators, or behavioural patterns in financial data is highly valued

• Strong technical skills in SQL and Python

• Experience with data visualisation or business intelligence tools (e.g. Power BI) is beneficial but not the primary focus of the role

• Exposure to transaction monitoring, KYT/KYC processes, or compliance analytics is a must

• Strong analytical and curious mind with excellent research, communication, and presentation skills

• Self-discipline, quality conscious and goal-oriented approach and readiness for an agile working environment

 
 
 Candidates must have the legal right to work in Switzerland at the time of hire. This position is 100% on-site in Zurich, Switzerland. 
 Start: asap

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Tax Specialist
jobs.description:
• Mission 
 As part of the Tax Services team, the Tax Specialist is a key element to ensure the quality and accuracy of the reporting done by the Bank, as a regulatory obligation, in an environment which is subject to constant changes and evolutions. Within the Daily Regulatory Reporting team, the employee’s mission also includes constant monitoring and reconciliation of the data to be reported. The tax and regulatory topics include MIFID II/ EMIR / FMIA / FINFRAG / Duty to disclose.
 
• Main responsibilities 
• Daily monitoring and control of regulatory reporting (MIFID II / EMIR / FMIA / FINFRAG) sent to the reporting platform(s) (i.e. locals regulators)

• Monthly reconciliations, quality control and statistics of the data reported

• Manage inquiries and investigate questions and issues about the taxes or regulatory reporting from other departments of the Bank or from external counterparties

• Understand regulatory risk sensitivity and has an end-to-end view of the Bank’s flow/process

• Correction of consistency issues, update reporting tool’s database

• Liaising and coordinating with the department responsible for the underlying data for the necessary corrections, explanations, data input and resubmission of the corrected report(s)

• Communication with the reporting engine providers (ARM, APA, TR)

• Performing regular and ad-hoc reporting related to statistics for internal and external parties

• Contribute to all testing linked to regulatory and reporting updates

• Active participation in EMIR/MIFID/DTD projects (Audit inquiries, Provider specifications changes & Regulator inquiries) including data mining and in-depth investigation
 
 

• Open mind and team orientation: 
Be open to other’s ideas.
Express and accept constructive criticism.

• Innovation and development: 
Propose and seek improvement of the current tools and processes.
Be positive towards change and seek opportunities to improve the quality of the working environment.
Conitunuously work on knowledge improvement.

• Project management experience

descriptionByLocale.it:
• Mission As part of the Tax Services team, the Tax Specialist is a key element to ensure the quality and accuracy of the reporting done by the Bank, as a regulatory obligation, in an environment which is subject to constant changes and evolutions. Within the Daily Regulatory Reporting team, the employee’s mission also includes constant monitoring and reconciliation of the data to be reported. The tax and regulatory topics include MIFID II/ EMIR / FMIA / FINFRAG / Duty to disclose.
• Main responsibilities
• Daily monitoring and control of regulatory reporting (MIFID II / EMIR / FMIA / FINFRAG) sent to the reporting platform(s) (i.e. locals regulators)
• Monthly reconciliations, quality control and statistics of the data reported
• Manage inquiries and investigate questions and issues about the taxes or regulatory reporting from other departments of the Bank or from external counterparties
• Understand regulatory risk sensitivity and has an end-to-end view of the Bank’s flow/process
• Correction of consistency issues, update reporting tool’s database
• Liaising and coordinating with the department responsible for the underlying data for the necessary corrections, explanations, data input and resubmission of the corrected report(s)
• Communication with the reporting engine providers (ARM, APA, TR)
• Performing regular and ad-hoc reporting related to statistics for internal and external parties
• Contribute to all testing linked to regulatory and reporting updates
• Active participation in EMIR/MIFID/DTD projects (Audit inquiries, Provider specifications changes & Regulator inquiries) including data mining and in-depth investigation
• Open mind and team orientation: Be open to other’s ideas. Express and accept constructive criticism.
• Innovation and development: Propose and seek improvement of the current tools and processes. Be positive towards change and seek opportunities to improve the quality of the working environment. Conitunuously work on knowledge improvement.
• Corporate culture: Be ‘solution oriented’ and have a strong sense of customer services. Be proactive and driven. Developp and maintain a relationship network within the various Bank departments. Comply consistently with internal and external regulations.
• Your Profile
• Good knowledge of the financial products and associated transactions
• 3-5 years of experience in banking or financial services
• Project management experience
• Strong Excel, Access skills

• Ability to efficiently manage priorities

• Seek opportunities to improve the existing set-up

• Maintain quality standards despite schedule pressures
• Fluent in French and English

• Swiss Residence Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Financial Controller - Retrocession Specialist
jobs.description:
Mission 
Your primary mission is to calculate retrocessions (commissions) payable to External Asset Managers (EAMs) and business introducers across the Group.
 Main responsibilities 
 
• Receive, digitize, and file contracts.

• Enter base data into the dedicated commission system.

• Control and correct source data used in commission calculations.

• Verify calculations, including VAT computation.

• Interact with and respond to questions from Group Accounting, the EAM department, and Relationship Managers.

• Verify provisions related to retrocessions.

• Run simulation scenarios for retrocession calculations for new contracts.

• Enter and validate non-full-STP (non-automated) retrocession domains.

• Produce various reports (statistics, accounting entries creation, supporting documents dispatch).
 
 General competencies 
 
• Consistently comply with internal and external regulations.

• Seek opportunities to improve the quality of the working environment at all levels.

• Maintain quality standards while meeting deadlines.
 
 Your Profile 
 
• 5+ years’ experience desired in accounting or administration.

• Precision, flexibility, rigor, adaptability, strong sense of responsibility and service, stress resilience, and ability to meet deadlines.

• Strong organizational skills and discretion.

• Good command of standard office tools (Excel, Word; Business Objects is a plus). Knowledge of the

• Quartal Commission system is a strong advantage.
 
 Languages 
 Native French or bilingual level; very good command of English (spoken and written).
 Personal skills 
 
• Open and transparent communication.

• Critical thinking.

• Strong capacity for innovation (open to new ideas and continuous improvements).

• Firm and mature approach in challenging situations.
 
 Others 
 
• Familiarity with commission processes and VAT rules in a financial institution is an asset.

• Comfort working with partial or non-automated workflows and validating edge cases.
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Financial Controller - Transfer Pricing & Analytics
jobs.description:
Mission 
Support the bank’s Management Control function by structuring and governing the profit-center hierarchy, driving transfer pricing (SLA) calculations and revenue allocations, and enhancing profitability analyses. Lead data quality and automation initiatives (primarily in Excel/VBA, with Business Objects/SQL/Power BI as assets) to deliver reliable monthly reporting, budgeting, and forecasting in close collaboration with Accounting, IT, and Business teams.
 Main responsibilities 
 
 Hierarchy and governance: 
 
• Manage and maintain the profit-center hierarchy, including AuM and revenue splits by legal entities, business lines, and geographies.

• Validate reference data (cost/profit centers, P&L by management groups) to ensure consistency, traceability, and auditability.
 
 Transfer pricing (SLA): 
 
• Participate in transfer pricing calculations and allocate revenues across accounting entities.

• Document allocation rules, trace methodologies, and contribute to coherence controls and reconciliations.
 
 Profitability calculations: 
 
• Contribute to profitability calculations and models (formulas, inputs, simulations) for products, clients, and business units.

• Prepare variance analyses and validation materials for management review and governance committees.
 
 Data, tools, and automation: 
 
• Develop ad hoc automation projects (Excel/VBA/Business Objects/SQL) to streamline data flows and reporting processes.

• Improve data quality through controls, alerts, and accounting vs. management reporting reconciliations.

• Produce and enhance dashboards and KPIs (AuM, revenues, profitability by BU/product/client).
 
 

 Support and coordination: 
 
• Provide support to the Head of Management Control for monthly reporting, budget, and forecast cycles.

• Collaborate with Accounting, IT, and Business stakeholders to align processes, ensure data integrity, and deliver accurate outputs.
 
 Your Profile 
 Education 
 Bachelor’s degree in Economics, Finance, Management, or HES (University of Applied Sciences) in Business/Economics/Finance.
 
 Experience and Technical skills 
 
• Initial experience in management control, audit, or finance within a banking environment.

• Solid foundations in management accounting: cost and revenue allocation, profitability analysis.

• Excellent command of Excel with VBA and a strong appetite for process automation.

• Knowledge of Business Objects, SQL, and/or Power BI is an advantage.

• Familiarity with banking KPIs (AuM, revenues, margins) and multi-axis reporting (entity, business line, geography) is advantageous.

• Comfort working with SLAs, documented allocation rules, and traceable methodologies.
 
 Languages 
 Professional proficiency in English; additional languages are an asset.
 
 Personal skills 
 
• Rigorous, analytical, autonomous, and detail-oriented, with strong critical thinking.

• Strong documentation mindset and attention to data quality and controls.

• Collaborative, able to coordinate with cross-functional teams (Accounting, IT, Business).

• Problem-solving mindset and ability to work under deadlines in a monthly closing context.
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

Lead data quality and automation initiatives (primarily in Excel/VBA, with Business Objects/SQL/Power BI as assets) to deliver reliable monthly reporting, budgeting, and forecasting in close collaboration with Accounting, IT, and Business teams. Main responsibilities Hierarchy and governance:
• Manage and maintain the profit-center hierarchy, including AuM and revenue splits by legal entities, business lines, and geographies.
• Validate reference data (cost/profit centers, P&L by management groups) to ensure consistency, traceability, and auditability. Transfer pricing (SLA):
• Participate in transfer pricing calculations and allocate revenues across accounting entities.
• Document allocation rules, trace methodologies, and contribute to coherence controls and reconciliations. Profitability calculations:
• Contribute to profitability calculations and models (formulas, inputs, simulations) for products, clients, and business units.
• Prepare variance analyses and validation materials for management review and governance committees. Data, tools, and automation:
• Develop ad hoc automation projects (Excel/VBA/Business Objects/SQL) to streamline data flows and reporting processes.
• Improve data quality through controls, alerts, and accounting vs. management reporting reconciliations.
• Produce and enhance dashboards and KPIs (AuM, revenues, profitability by BU/product/client). Support and coordination:
• Provide support to the Head of Management Control for monthly reporting, budget, and forecast cycles.
• Collaborate with Accounting, IT, and Business stakeholders to align processes, ensure data integrity, and deliver accurate outputs. Your Profile Education Bachelor’s degree in Economics, Finance, Management, or HES (University of Applied Sciences) in Business/Economics/Finance. Experience and Technical skills
• Initial experience in management control, audit, or finance within a banking environment.
• Solid foundations in management accounting: cost and revenue allocation, profitability analysis.
• Excellent command of Excel with VBA and a strong appetite for process automation.
• Knowledge of Business Objects, SQL, and/or Power BI is an advantage.
• Familiarity with banking KPIs (AuM, revenues, margins) and multi-axis reporting (entity, business line, geography) is advantageous.
• Comfort working with SLAs, documented allocation rules, and traceable methodologies. Languages Professional proficiency in English; additional languages are an asset. Personal skills
• Rigorous, analytical, autonomous, and detail-oriented, with strong critical thinking.
• Strong documentation mindset and attention to data quality and controls.
• Collaborative, able to coordinate with cross-functional teams (Accounting, IT, Business).
• Problem-solving mindset and ability to work under deadlines in a monthly closing context. Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Database administrator
jobs.description:
Mission 
 We are seeking a skilled and experienced Database Administrator (DBA) to join our team in Geneva. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of successfully installing, managing, and maintaining database systems. This role requires a proactive individual with a strong technical background, excellent problem-solving skills, and a commitment to ensuring the security, performance, and reliability of our database infrastructure. Experience with Data Guard and RMAN is highly desirable, and familiarity with data lake implementation is a plus.
 
 Key Responsibilities 
 
 Database Administration 
• Install, configure, monitor, and maintain database systems, including Oracle, Sybase, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB.
• Perform database troubleshooting, including performance tuning, technical issue resolution, and backup/restore operations.
• Manage and administer corporate data to ensure consistency, accessibility, and security.
• Define and implement technical database architectures, including clustering, replication, and high-availability solutions.
• Provide database support for development teams, ensuring optimal performance and scalability of applications.
• Contribute to the design and implementation of data lake solutions (preferred but not mandatory).
 
 Security & Compliance 
• Adhere to and enforce the organization’s security framework, ensuring compliance with established policies and procedures.
• Maintain a strong awareness of security best practices to protect the organization from vulnerabilities and potential exploits.
• Collaborate with stakeholders to ensure database systems align with security and compliance requirements.
 
 Collaboration & Innovation 
• Work closely with cross-functional teams to support business objectives and deliver high-quality database solutions.
• Stay updated on emerging database technologies and trends, recommending improvements to existing systems and processes.
 
 Skills & Experience 
 
 Experience 
• Minimum of 3+ years of hands-on experience in database administration. 
• Proven expertise in managing and optimizing Sybase, Oracle, and SQL Server databases.
• Experience with Data Guard and RMAN is highly desirable.
• Experience in data lake implementation is a plus.
 
 Technical Skills 
• Proficiency in database management tools and technologies, including DataGuard, RMAN, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB.
• Strong knowledge of database performance tuning, backup and recovery strategies, and high-availability solutions.
• Familiarity with database security best practices and compliance standards.
 
 Soft Skills 
• Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams.
• Results-oriented mindset with a focus on delivering high-quality solutions.
• Detail-oriented, organized, and able to work efficiently under pressure.
• Flexible and adaptable to changing priorities and business needs.
 
 Languages 
• Fluency in English and French is required.
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.title: Junior Derivatives & Structured Products Specialist
jobs.description:
Environment: 
 The Structured Products Team of the Treasury and Trading Department is in charge of the issuance process, the hedging and the monitoring of the structured products issued by the bank. The team is also in charge of the trading of OTC Equity Derivatives such as Equity Options and Equity Accumulators/Decumulators. This junior position provides a great opportunity to join a dynamic team on the trading floor and to strengthen your skills in OTC Equity Derivatives and Structured Products trading. As a Junior Derivatives & Structured Products Specialist, you will support the team in all its business activities, and you will reinforce your knowledge and experience about capital markets and OTC Equity Derivatives and Structured Products trading.
 Mission: 
 
• Trading of OTC Equity Derivatives such as OTC Equity Options and Equity Accumulators/Decumulators.

• Structuration, hedging and trading of the structured products issued by the bank (cross-asset with a strong focus on equity linked products).

• Monitoring of the structured products lifecycle management (underlying performance, corporate event, coupon, early redemption and maturity redemption).

• Improvement of the structured products issuance and the OTC derivatives trading processes automation.
 
 Main duties: 
 
• Trading of OTC Equity Derivatives such as OTC Equity Options and Equity Accumulators/Decumulators.

• Trading of structured products and their hedges with internal and external counterparties on the primary and secondary markets.

• Development of IT tools to increase trading efficiency and to avoid operational risks.

• Assistance to the team for regulatory and legal aspects (Termsheets, Key Information Documents, Target Markets, …).
 
 Profile: 
 Previous experience of 1 to 3 years in trading OTC Equity Derivatives and Structured Products
 Education: Master degree with a specialization in Finance is a strong plus
 Excellent knowledge of Excel and Bloomberg
 Programming skills in VBA is a plus
 High Motivation, high attention to detail
 Excellent entrepreneurial and organizational skills
 Quantitative, analytical and flexible
 Very strong team spirit and ability to partner with other teams
 Fluent in French and English
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.title: Senior Compliance Officer- Special Investigations Unit

titleByLocale.en: Senior Compliance Officer- Special Investigations Unit
titleByLocale.fr: Senior Compliance Officer- Special Investigations Unit
titleByLocale.it: Senior Compliance Officer- Special Investigations Unit
titleByLocale.de: Senior Compliance Officer- Special Investigations Unit

jobs.description:
Mission & Main duties of SIU team 
• Main unit of WM Compliance responsible for internal investigative efforts and handling of cases with enhanced FCC risk. 
• Team’s main duty is to handle internal investigations with the responsibility to conclude them in the timely manner and observance of Bank’s regulatory and reporting duties.
 • Key responsibilities Senior Compliance Officer in SIU : 
• Handling of internal investigations, internal escalations, submission of files to AML Committee for the decision regarding SAR filing and answers to Authority Requests.
• Additional responsibilities include daily screening of client names, handling Request for Information (RFI) for correspondent banks and media watch.
• Treatment of internal and external audit requests as well as analysis of files with high management attention.
 • Main Committees: 
• AMLC
• ARC
• Sanctions Committee
 • Core competencies: 
• Knowledge of Swiss Banking regulations, provisions of Swiss AML law, Swiss Criminal Code and MROS practice
• Experience in Financial Crime Compliance and AML 
• Strong adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility, and Responsibility.
• Compliance with regulations and internal directives.
 • Specific Competencies and other Skills/Abilities: 
• Curiosity, adaptability, analytical and holistic approach, ability to work in a team and drawing conclusions upon collected facts.
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives
